title: Irlbachia tatei
taxonomy: Irlbachia tatei is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is a member of the genus Irlbachia, which is native to South America. The plant is classified within the tribe Griselinieae, a subfamily of the Amaryllidaceae family. Further classification includes the order Asparagales and the class Liliopsida. The classification of Irlbachia tatei reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
uses: Irlbachia tatei is a species of flowering plant, but information about its medicinal uses is limited. Further research is needed to determine its potential benefits or applications in traditional medicine. properties: Irlbachia tatei has been reported to possess therapeutic properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. parts: Irlbachia tatei is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. Irlbachia tatei contains iridoid glycosides, which are compounds with potential medicinal properties.
